titleStmt.title: Card to the Hon. Secretary from Mary Bourke Dowling, 8 November 1915
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Mary Bourke Dowling

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Mary Bourge Dowling writes to the Honorary Secretary of the Irish Woman's Franchise League indicating that Hanna Sheehy Skeffington has asked her to chair the upcoming meeting, but she is unable to attend.

msIdentifier.collection: Sheehy-Skeffington Papers, Collection List No. 47; MS 33,604/13-2

correspAction.persName: Honorary Secretary of Irish Woman's Franchise League

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
9/11/15 Mrs S.S. has written me asking me to chair meeting tonight. This is quite improbable for me to be present. I have left word to that effect at ArowSTNS but don't know if they can arrange because they were too busy to speak to me, but you can leave word that I couldn't, and sombody at meeting will take chair. Mary Bourke Dowling
DUBLIN POST CARD Immediate 1:45 PM 9 Nov 15 Hon Secretary Irish Women's Franchise League Westmoreland Street Dublin
